captcha-desc: Waxay bixisaa farsamooyinka CAPTCHA si looga ilaaliyo spam iyo isku dayga qiyaasidda erayga sirta ah.
captcha-badlogin: Si loo ilaaliyo wiki-ga ka hortagga jabinta sirta tooska ah, waxaan si naxariis leh kaaga codsanaynaa inaad xalliso hawsha hoose oo aad geli jawaabta sanduuqa ([[Special:Captcha/help|faahfaahin dheeraad ah]]):
captcha-createaccount: Si loo ilaaliyo wiki-ga ka hortagga abuurista akoonnada tooska ah, waxaan si naxariis leh kaaga codsanaynaa inaad xalliso hawsha hoose oo aad geli jawaabta sanduuqa ([[Special:Captcha/help|faahfaahin dheeraad ah]]):
captcha-sendemail: Si loo ilaaliyo wiki-ga ka hortagga spam-ka tooska ah, waxaan si naxariis leh kaaga codsanaynaa inaad xalliso hawsha hoose oo aad geli jawaabta sanduuqa ([[Special:Captcha/help|faahfaahin dheeraad ah]]):
captcha-disabledinapi: Tallaabadani waxay u baahan tahay CAPTCHA, sidaas darteed laguma fulin karo API-ga.
right-skipcaptcha: Samee falal kicinaya CAPTCHA adigoon marin CAPTCHA-ga
